name: moments-packaging-backend-java-first-client
description: Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 backend for Moments Packaging Kenya. The platform is a fully self-serve e-commerce platform where customers browse products, configure orders, and pay directly via PayHero (M-Pesa STK push), bank transfer, or cash on delivery. Enterprise orders (10,000+ units) are routed to the sales team via a dedicated quote endpoint.
